expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 3: 'Full check: docker exec nextcloud bash -c ... composer check'. Also runs phpcs, phpstan, psalm individually. The docker exec pattern and composer check command are explicitly specified.

SKILL.md Step 3: 'Fix any violations before marking the task complete.' Step 2 'Forbidden Patterns' section lists specific violations that will fail PHPCS. Step 3 runs all four tools. Violations must be fixed, not ignored.

SKILL.md Step 3 instruction is unconditional: 'Fix any violations before marking the task complete.' There is no option to skip — the quality gate runs after every implementation. The Guardrails section of SKILL.md does not include any skip option.

SKILL.md Step 3 says 'Fix any violations' but does not specify a reporting step for what was fixed. Step 4 updates plan.json and tasks.md but there is no 'list all quality fixes' instruction. The skill fixes silently — it doesn't produce a quality-fix summary.

notes: Quality gate (run + fix + no-skip) is fully specified. Gap: no reporting step for what quality violations were fixed. Adding a brief 'Quality fixes applied: [list]' to Step 3 output would close this.
